title: Chapter 2
content:
Chapter 2: Sophia

[Welcome, Player]

[You have been granted a second chance at life. Complete taboo missions and earn taboo points to upgrade your ability and finally become the Taboo Emperor of this world]

[Does player want to continue in this world or go back to his old world where he died]

[Continue] [Old World]

"What the hell is this crap. Looks like all those system manhwa my friends used to read, I could never really get into that. I would rather go back to my old world with the porn mangas and women waiting for me"

Before he proceeded to click on the old world option presented to him his hand stopped

’I have to give this a little more thought. If everything that has happened is really true that means I actually died, and I felt it, I felt the car hit me and I felt the impact when I hit the floor’ he thought while pulling his hand back and putting it on his chin

’If I go back to my old world does that mean I’ll be going back to a disabled body and worst to a body that is already dead. With these odds, I think continuing in this world is the best option. Even if it is a joke, I lose nothing in the end’

He then pulled his hand away from his chin and clicked on the continue option

[Congratulations Player! You have been given the title Taboo Emperor]

[Choose one skill from the skills below as a starting bonus]

[First Skill]

[Description: Player can send thoughts to other humans]

[Rank: E]

[Second Skill]

[Description: Player’s touch heightens the sensitivity of a females body upon touch]

[Rank: E]

[Third Skill]

[Description: Player has the ability read the thoughts of other humans]

[Rank: E]

Denzel smiled, already knowing which skill he was going to choose

’That’s a nice list of skills there but it isn’t necessary, I already know which skill I will be choosing’

He clicked on the second skill making it his choice.

’Asides the fact that I might go back to a dead body in my old world, one of the main reasons I decided to stay is because of these memories I’m getting since I came here. I’m getting memories of the old user of this body’s mother and elder sister’ he chuckled on the thought of it

’And since I’m in control of this body now, I’m definitely going to be having my way with the both of them and this skill is going to achieve that for me. Hehehe’

The system interrupted his thought with a pop up notification

[Skill has been added to Host arsenal]

And immediately after, a long list dropped

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 years]

[Strength: 10]

[Agility: 10]

[Sense: 10]

[Vitality: 10]

[Stamina: 10]

[Mana: 10/10]

[Rank: E]

[Harem: 0]

[Taboo points: 0]

’It has my name on it so this should be my stats. Ridrat? I guess thats this body’s family name but we share the same first name. Thats good I wouldn’t want to answer anything else, I have plans of making the women of this world scream that name as I pound them ruthlessly’ he chuckled

’All of the stats are self explanatory based on the knowledge I have from the manhwa in my old world but one thing here doesn’t make sense...Taboo points? What is that, it also said I am the taboo emperor. I don’t know what all that means’

The system popped up a notification as if hearing his thoughts

[Earn taboo points by completing taboo activities with women and upgrade your skills to become the Taboo Emperor]

’I see, that explains it. So basically, I should do what I planned to do and become an Emperor doing it. Deal’

He got up from the pile of grass he was laying on and dusted himself enough to look presentable and not appear as an animal. Then he sighted dry blood on the grass as he looked at it now standing.

’That’s right, if my memories are correct then the previous Denzel slipped and his head so hard on the floor that he died, that’s sad.’

’Well, I’ve got everything I need time to head back home and get welcomed by two fucking grown women. Lets see what they look like. My house isn’t isn’t that far from here, its just a turn at the end of the mini road there’

He walked towards the end of the carved out road and made the turn. There were a lot of houses around but it wasn’t difficult to spot his, it wasn’t the fanciest there but he didnt really care much about that. All he cared about were the people inside the house.

’That’s my house over there, let’s get this new life started’

He got to the front of the door and with a deep breath he lifted his hands to knock on the door

*knock*

"Who’s there, I’m coming" a beautiful female voice said out loud from inside the building

Denzel gulped

After a few seconds, the door know turned and the door opened.

His eyes fixed to her face and almost instantly as if he was being controlled it pulled down to her chest. Huge. Heavy breasts.

’What in the feminine beauty is this’

This was the first thought that came into his mind as he saw the goddess like figure present before him.

The girl before him was previous Denzel’s sister, Sophia, who was older than him. she was wrapped in a tight, worn bodice that barely held back her massive and heavy Boobs.

The laces strained to contain them, her deep cleavage spilling out, daring eyes to linger. Below, a rough faded skirt clung to her wide hips and thick ass, the fabric stretched so tight it left little to the imagination. Every subtle shift made her made her curves jiggle, teasing and tempting.

’So she is one of my targets, Sophia. A woman with such slutty curves should not exist in this world, heck it didnt even exist in my fictional porn mangas’

’I can’t even imagine what the mother looks like. I give thanks to thay car for hitting me in my world if this is the result. I should be in for a treat’

~~~
